:::::::: {.page .text}
# About us {#about-us .title}

Refactoring.Guru is a website dedicated to the topic of refactoring and
design patterns. It is designed as a practical guide to refactoring,
which can be used by both beginners and experienced developers.

## Payments and Delivery

We sell only digital products. You can check out or catalog on this
page: [https://refactoring.guru/catalog](refactoring/catalog.html)

You can pay us via credit/debit cards (Visa, MasterCard, AmEx, Discover,
JCB, and more), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, iDeal, NetBanking, WeChat
Pay, and Alipay. You can also pay using cryptocurrency. The products
will be delivered to you right after purchase.

We offer 30-day refunds for all our products. If you are not satisfied
with the product, you can request a refund by contacting us via the
email address below.

## Contact Us

If you have any questions, please contact us:

-   By email: <support@refactoring.guru>
-   By visiting this page on our website:
    [https://feedback.refactoring.guru](https://feedback.refactoring.guru/)
